about.label: The Photographer
about.title: About Me
about.philosophyQuote: "Photography is not about capturing what is there, but about rigorously deciding what to leave out of the frame. The essence lies in the shadow."
about.philosophyDesc: My research moves between documentation and construction, between the urban landscape and the body. I seek tension in the white space, meaning in the pause.
about.bio1: I am Davide Vassallo, a Milan-based photographer. I define my language through subtraction, geometric rigor and a constant research on identity and space.
about.bio2: With over ten years of experience in editorial and commercial sets, I intertwine documentary photography with the rigor of studio portraiture. My gaze is shaped by the European photojournalism tradition and the Japanese minimalist aesthetic.
about.bio3: I collaborate with communication agencies, luxury brands, cultural institutions and editorial publications. Every project is an open dialogue between who I am and who is looking.
